title: Fourth Species Above an A-minor Cantus (cold-model task)
objective: Syncopated (fourth-species) counterpoint above the given A-minor cantus.
prompt: V0 rests on beat 0, then attacks a duration-1 note on every half-beat (0.5, 1.5, ...), sustaining across each downbeat; write '-' in V0 on integer rows while a note sustains, and close with a single note at beat 10. Half-beat attacks (preparations and resolutions) must be consonant; a dissonant downbeat is a suspension and must resolve down by step at the next half-beat. Cadence with G# into the final octave.
success_criteria: V0 attacks only on half-beats plus the final beat.
Half-beat attack intervals consonant; dissonant downbeats resolve down by step.

interval_rules.label: Fourth-species preparations and resolutions must be consonant
